remaining_work: Write 6 page-type design briefs: library-collection, creation-canvas, workshop-sandbox, triage, settings, editor-with-chat
Write 7 per-domain icon-set briefs: sites, brainstorm, plans, components, media, research, admin
Write 2 cross-cutting briefs: chrome-collapse pattern, glass slide-out pattern
Each brief cites at least 2 product references (Cursor, Figma, Leonardo, Linear, Codex Desktop, JSFiddle, etc.)
Produce a consolidation plan that turns the research into a buildable implementation plan

evidence.note: Today's parallel-lane run operationalized the existing /studio.html shell using the design template that already shipped (commits 3fa3a8c + ff9ae42). It did NOT do per-page-type design research — that's still this plan's open work. The shell as it stands today is the surface the design research will inform.
The Claude Design template (12-screen single-page React app) is the visual foundation in play today. Per-page-type research can build on top of it.

memory_candidates.title: Design research is a prerequisite, not a follow-up
memory_candidates.body: Per-page-type design research must precede further Workbench/Studio shell implementation work. The 2026-05-10 functional-wiring run was scoped to operationalize the EXISTING shell with honest action contracts; it did not extend page-type variety. Future shell expansion (new layouts, new chrome patterns) should land this plan's six page-type briefs first.
